target: 32. The Mystery Cipher
(But to think no one knows her contact info. How am I supposed to find her now...)

Hey, Shinpei.
Can you check this for me?
What?
I forgot to mention this earlier, but... When I asked Hizuru for her contact info, she gave me this. I don't understand what it means at all.
Huh…!
(Contact info!! Nagumo-sensei's!)
Sensei gave this to you...
Yeah, but this isn't a phone number, it's a code, right? She really is a strange girl...
(This is her contact info? What does it mean? Just like Alain said, it's like a code--)
Sorry, Shinpei. I'm gonna use the restroom real quick...
This is... this code is...!
(I've seen something similar to this before!! It's the <color=#GF_TIPS_096>unbreakable cipher</color> from Nagumo-sensei's "Drift"-- "Tamam Shud"!!)
(If I remember correctly, the solution to this cipher is--)
(A-Alright...! I managed to crack it...!)
(This string of numbers... It's a phone number. It really was her contact info.)
I'll give it a try.
...!! Hello! Is this Nagumo-sensei!?
…Who are you?
(It's not Nagumo-sensei... A hoarse man's voice... I feel like I've heard it somewhere before...)
If you're gonna ask for someone's name, introduce yourself first. Ain't that basic manners...?
Ah, um…
I-I'm Shinpei Ajiro... And you are...?
Is that so... That was faster than I expected...

I'm Nezu.
Ginjiro Nezu.
(...Nezu-san! The guy who told me about the Shadow Sickness at Koba Mart before the first loop!)
"Nagumo-sensei" and I are somewhat acquainted...
How did you find out? You... about this number?
Nagumo-sensei gave Alain a code...
You cracked that thing?
Y-Yes!! A similar code appears in Sensei's book, so...
In the story, the solution isn't revealed, but it's designed so that you can deduce it from a meta perspective...
When I tried converting the characters using that solution... It became an 11-digit number. So I figured it was probably... a phone number...
Hm…
You... You're at the funeral hall right now, aren't ya?
Yes!
Then slip out of there and come out front.
Eh...
Come alone! I'll contact you again.
Um!! Hello!?
(I came out alone like he told me to... But there's no one here?)
Hello!? Nezu-san... I-I'm here!!
Alright... You're alone, right?

Yes!
Of course!
Um... What should I do from here...!?
Don't move.
Huh!?
Like a scarecrow... Just stand there completely still.
(!? What is he planning!?)
It'll be over soon enough...
Wait... You've gotta be kidding me!!
(Th-There's a hole in the ground...!!)
Did you... just shoot something? Nezu-san!?
That was you just now, right, Nezu-san...!?
It seems… like a human.
(He sniped my shadow to check if I was a Shadow...!?)
Hizuru says she'll meet you. Come to the Fourth Artillery Battery Ruins.
Hahaha... Even if it's just my shadow, getting shot with a gun might be a crazy experience...
(Nagumo-sensei... I'm finally going to meet you...!)
If you... truly can return--
Tell me... your name. I will definitely help you.
(If I can cooperate with Sensei from the first day... We can defeat Mio!!)
(And why does Sensei know about the Shadows... There's a mountain of things I need to ask her...!!)
...The Fourth Artillery Battery Ruins, huh.
